articles.title: Global bonds tumble on fears of inflation shock from Iran war
articles.body: Stocks dragged lower as traders price in US interest rate rises after worse than expected data releases

articles.title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.1%, highest in nearly a year
articles.body: Treasuries spiked on Friday as inflation signals continue to muddy interest rate expectations under the new Federal Reserve chair Kevin Warsh.

articles.title: Family investors turn to old-economy businesses like dealerships and fisheries to avoid AI disruption
articles.body: While car dealerships and fisheries are less eye-catching than high-flying AI startups, they offer stability and cash flow that's attractive to family offices.
